projects.title: Products & projects
projects.description: Products I've built: from production Shopify apps serving tens of thousands of merchants, enterprise-grade internal management systems, to personal side projects.

items.title: OPTIS Product Options, Variant
items.description: A Shopify app for advanced product customization — custom options, conditional logic, dynamic pricing, and storefront product configuration beyond Shopify's default variant limitations.
items.meta: Full-stack Engineer / 20,000+ installs / 5-star Shopify App Store
features: Custom product options (dropdown, checkbox, swatch, file upload, text...)
Conditional logic — show/hide options based on customer selections
Live preview — customers see changes instantly on the product page
And many more advanced customization features
responsibilities: Full-stack ownership — admin UI, backend APIs & storefront runtime
Involved across the full product lifecycle — from requirements analysis and technical design to feature development and production deployment
Merchant support — resolving technical issues, assisting customers & contributing to install growth, reviews, and maintaining a 5★ app rating

items.title: OP Color Swatch Variant Images
items.description: A Shopify app for enhanced variant experience — multiple variant display styles, variant-specific image galleries, product grouping, and beyond the display limitations of default Shopify themes.
items.meta: Full-stack Engineer / 10,000+ installs / 5-star Shopify App Store
items.imageAlt: OP Color Swatch Shopify app variant interface
features: Visual swatches replacing Shopify's default variant selector
Variant image gallery — each variant displays its own image set
Combined listings — merge multiple products into a single storefront listing
Collection page swatches — browse variants directly from the collection page
And many more advanced display features
responsibilities: Full-stack ownership — admin UI, backend APIs & storefront runtime
Involved across the full product lifecycle — from requirements analysis and technical design to feature development and production deployment
Merchant support — resolving technical issues, assisting customers & contributing to install growth, reviews, and maintaining a 5★ app rating

items.title: Mid-Autumn
items.description: A personal project during university — an online mooncake sales application, focused on shopping experience, user management, and end-to-end sales flow on the web platform.

items.title: VTI Manufacturing Management Systems
items.description: Internal management systems for manufacturing enterprises — supporting factory operations, production workflows, warehouse management, quality control, and enterprise business processes. Internal tools with no public links.
items.meta: VTI Solutions / ReactJS Intern / Internal enterprise tools

about.name: Le Cong Nghia
paragraphs: Born in 2003, I am a Full-stack Developer specializing in building Shopify applications and web products for real-world needs. I have hands-on experience across the stack — from backend services and admin systems to storefront runtime components serving merchants directly.
I currently work at BSS Commerce, focused on Shopify platform development and building applications that serve over 30,000 merchants on the Shopify App Store.
I always want to build software with clear architecture, maintainability, and scalability — and I always want to find the right approach for real-world engineering problems.

experienceItems.context: Contributed to building and maintaining production Shopify applications serving over 30,000 merchants — involved in storefront runtime, backend API, and admin systems — addressing product customization and variant experience challenges beyond Shopify's default capabilities.
responsibilities: Storefront runtime logic on merchant themes
App operations support & technical issue resolution
modules: OP Color Swatch Variant Images — 10,000+ installs · 5-star

experienceItems.context: Contributed to developing 3 enterprise-grade internal management systems for Yamaha and FujiX — Smart Warehouse Management and Quality Management Systems — helping digitize factory operations, production quality control, and complex enterprise business workflows.
modules: Yamaha WMSX — Smart Warehouse Management System
